mainEntity.name: What is included in annual ROC filing?

acceptedAnswer.text: AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7 (annual return), ADT-1 (auditor appointment). Due within 30-60 days of AGM.
Yes. DIR-12 for appointment/resignation, DIR-3 KYC annual update, DIN deactivation if needed.

mainEntity.name: What happens if ROC filings are delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: Additional fees of ₹100/day per form. Prolonged default can lead to company strike-off and director disqualification.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide cs services in Tiruchirappalli?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu. Central Tamil Nadu's industrial hub. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

mainEntity.name: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Tiruchirappalli?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Tiruchirappalli clients.

mainEntity.name: How do I get started with cs services in Tiruchirappalli?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Tiruchirappalli businesses with no location surcharges.
